title: Crepidium luniferum
taxonomy: Crepidium luniferum is a species of orchid in the genus Crepidium. The genus Crepidium is classified within the subfamily Maxillarieae, which is part of the family Orchidaceae. Further classification places Maxillarieae in the subfamily of Apostasioideae. Apostasioideae is one of the most ancient subfamilies of orchids, and it shares characteristics with other ancient lineages. The classification of Crepidium luniferum reflects its evolutionary history within the orchid family.
uses: Crepidium luniferum is reported to have potential medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
